mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM member_update_requests WHERE status = 'PENDING'
-- 发布中任务数量 SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tasks WHERE status = 'PUBLISHING'
-- 待完结任务数量 SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tasks WHERE status = 'PENDING_END'

SELECT pb.id AS branchId, pb.name AS branchName, COALESCE(SUM(sr.duration), 0) AS totalDuration FROM party_branches pb LEFT JOIN members m ON m.branch_id = pb.id LEFT JOIN study_records sr ON sr.user_id = m.id GROUP BY pb.id, pb.name ORDER BY totalDuration DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM members WHERE branch_id = #{branchId} AND branch_id IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tasks t WHERE t.status = 'PUBLISHING' AND t.branch_id = #{branchId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tasks t WHERE t.status = 'PENDING_END' AND t.branch_id = #{branchId}
